## Editorial & QA Checklist

_For trend-post drafts, complete every item before requesting review.
For other changes, check any relevant items._

### Content Quality
- [ ] All `<!-- TODO -->` sections completed with original, specific content
- [ ] Hook is compelling and immediately relevant to the target reader
- [ ] Strategic POV reflects GrowthForge's actual positioning and voice
- [ ] Actionable steps are concrete — not generic filler

### Factual Verification
- [ ] All statistics cite a verifiable public source, or have been removed
- [ ] No fabricated client names, testimonials, or performance claims
- [ ] No unverifiable certifications, partnerships, or awards claimed
- [ ] Claims are consistent with GrowthForge's published service model

### Brand Voice & Tone
- [ ] Tone matches GrowthForge style: direct, expert, non-salesy
- [ ] Answer-first paragraphs (short, direct answer before supporting detail)
- [ ] Reviewed against [/editorial-standards](https://www.growthforge-ai.com/editorial-standards)

### Internal Link Validity
- [ ] All internal links use clean canonical paths (e.g. `/about`, not `/about.html`)
- [ ] All internal links have been tested and resolve to a `200` status page
- [ ] No links to non-canonical or redirected URLs
- [ ] Key pages each have 3+ internal inlinks for SEO authority distribution

### Canonical URL / Path Review
- [ ] Slug follows site conventions (lowercase, hyphen-separated, no `.html` extension)
- [ ] `canonical_url` in frontmatter matches the intended published URL exactly
- [ ] Sitemap updated if a new page is being added
- [ ] `og:url` and structured-data `url` fields use the canonical path

### Compliance Review
- [ ] No regulated claims (financial, medical, legal advice)
- [ ] No competitor comparisons that could create legal or reputational liability
- [ ] GDPR/privacy considerations reviewed if collecting any data on-page
- [ ] `draft: true` flag removed (or converted to HTML) before merge
